title: Agentic AI in IT Delivery
description: Request to explore or implement agentic AI technology in the IT delivery process.
business_case_summary:
Business Case Summary: Agentic AI in IT Delivery (DEM-2026-0128)

Executive Summary
This project seeks to explore and implement agentic AI to enhance IT delivery efficiency and decision-making within the infrastructure domain. It aims to automate routine tasks and optimize resource allocation.

Business Value/Impact
Adopting agentic AI will reduce operational costs, accelerate project timelines, and improve service quality by enabling proactive issue resolution. This technology drives increased productivity and supports scalable IT infrastructure management.

Risk Mitigation
Risks associated with medium-level complexity can be managed through phased implementation, rigorous testing, and continuous monitoring. Ensuring data security and maintaining human oversight will minimize potential AI-related errors.
